title: Login Response DTO
description: 200 body for POST /api/v1/auth/login. Session expiry is NOT carried in the body — it is exposed via the `X-Session-Expires-At` response header (ISO-8601 UTC). `expires_at` appears in a response body only on GET /api/v1/auth/me. The SDK reads `data.access_token` and derives expiry from the JWT `exp` claim.

user.description: Authenticated user identity claims. Minimum required fields (id, email) are pinned; additional claims (name, role, org, …) are permitted. Full shape is at GET /api/v1/auth/me.

mfa_enabled.description: Present only when MFA is globally enabled.

csrf_token.description: Present only for cookie-mode auth (request sent with X-Use-Cookie-Auth).
